---
title: "Week 02: AI-assisted dev"
---

## Introduction

Coming soon!

## Recommended readings

- [Python tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/) - Official Python documentation

## Lectures

- [**Slides: AI-assisted development**](../slides/IS4010_W02_AI_Copilots.qmd)

- [Lab 02: AI-assisted dev](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-course)
